choices.text: One supervisor routes to specialists; specialists work; return; supervisor decides next. Loop until FINISH. Clean separation of concerns.
Many specialists (>10). Top supervisor → sub-supervisors → specialists. Manageable decision space per level.

questions.explanation: For >10 agents; hierarchy avoids supervisor overload.

choices.text: Transfer tools per agent route to peers. LangGraph Swarm for flat structure. Specialists know own domain.
Multiple edges from one node + merge. Send for dynamic count. Reducers for concurrent state.

questions.explanation: Fan-out edges + merge. Send for dynamic.

choices.text: Map-reduce with Send. Planner dispatches per-doc workers; aggregator merges. Parallel 100x faster.
